title: Keep Sleeping Bags + Compasses
description: Adds sleeping bags from the comforts mod and compasses (from nature's and explorer's compass mods) to the list of kept items
body:
# This project has been archived!
**It's been archived because KSI is not very customisable so I made my own it supports more mods with the add-on and it is available here: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/keepmoddedinventory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/keepmoddedinventory)**

-----

Do you want to use the comforts mod and the compasses (nature's and explorer's) mods with Keep Some Inventory?

Then use this datapack!

You don't need to have both the comforts mod and the compasses mods to use this datapack, you can use just one of the other (or none, but why).

Should work with every verison that Keep Some Inventory supports.
